name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Downey's Swift Title Loans at 10020 Tecum Rd in CA offers fast title loans and payday advances.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans is located at 10020 Tecum Rd #11 in Downey, CA. This standalone storefront serves Downey residents and the surrounding communities with convenient access to title loans and payday advances. The location is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 5 PM, with closed hours on Sunday.

At this Downey location, you can apply for title loans, payday advances, and other short-term lending products. The knowledgeable staff can discuss your options and guide you through the application process. For questions or to schedule an appointment, contact the Downey store directly at 562-444-1304.

If you're a Downey resident in need of quick cash, this Swift Title Loans location provides same-day approvals for qualifying applicants. Bring a valid government-issued ID and proof of income to speed up your application. The team at the Downey, CA location is committed to making the lending process straightforward and accessible.
pros: Same-day cash available for applications submitted before noon
Accepts applicants with bad credit scores and past bankruptcies
Borrowers keep and drive their vehicle while the loan is outstanding
Wide loan range of $100–$50,000 accommodates both small and larger cash needs
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm Mon–Fri) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
256-bit SSL and TLS encryption protect online applications
Staff member Alfred consistently praised across reviews for patience and clear explanations
cons: Vehicle title is held as collateral — default can result in repossession
No mobile app for payment management, requested by multiple reviewers
Exterior signage described as unclear for first-time visitors
Parking lot reported as crowded during peak hours
Closed Sundays with no 24/7 digital self-service option
best_for: Car owners with bad credit or past bankruptcies needing same-day emergency cash
Memphis-area borrowers who have been turned down by traditional lenders
Borrowers needing more than $1,000 who have a vehicle to use as collateral
Consumers who prefer in-person guidance through the loan application process
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best for Memphis-area car owners who need fast cash and have been rejected by traditional lenders due to poor credit or bankruptcy history. The main caveat is that title loans are a high-cost credit product — borrowers risk vehicle repossession if they miss payments, and should compare the full APR against credit union PALs or CDFI alternatives before applying.
services: Loans for applicants with bad credit
Loans for applicants with prior bankruptcies
In-person loan processing at Memphis branch
Loan repayment and title return processing
meta_description: Downey, CA: Swift Title Loans at 10020 Tecum Rd. Quick title loans with same-day approvals.
seo_title: Swift Title Loans in Downey, CA | CreditDoc
